speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Skills and abilities
questions: Is there anything you can't do yet?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I can swim. I can also cook simple meals. I can speak two languages, but I can't drive a car yet.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Asking for help
questions: Do you often ask people for help?
Can you give an example of asking for permission politely?
Who do you usually ask for help at work or school?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I sometimes ask for help. For example, I might say 'Can you help me with this?' I usually ask my colleagues or my teacher.
